summary: Iteration 22: Featured Photographers, AI Photo Tagging (GPT-4o Vision), and Full Messaging Flow testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: MapPage Featured Photographers panel, MessagesPage URL parameter handling, Profile Message button navigation, Accept/Decline message requests.

Backend APIs - Featured Photographers.GET /api/photographers/featured: PASS - Returns photographers ranked by score: earnings*2 + sessions*10 + gallery*5 + 100 if live
Backend APIs - Featured Photographers.limit parameter: PASS - Limit parameter correctly restricts results
Backend APIs - Featured Photographers.response structure: PASS - Returns id, full_name, avatar_url, role, is_verified, is_live, location, current_spot, session_price, total_earnings, total_sessions, gallery_count, score

Backend APIs - AI Photo Tagging (GPT-4o.POST /api/ai/analyze-photo: PASS - Analyzes surf photos using GPT-4o Vision, returns people_count, people details, conditions, overall_description
Backend APIs - AI Photo Tagging (GPT-4o.POST /api/ai/suggest-tags: PASS - Returns analysis and suggested surfer tags with confidence levels
Backend APIs - AI Photo Tagging (GPT-4o.POST /api/ai/confirm-tags: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid gallery items (proper error handling)
Backend APIs - AI Photo Tagging (GPT-4o.GET /api/ai/my-tagged-photos: PASS - Returns photos where user is tagged with total_count

Backend APIs - Messaging Flow.POST /api/messages/start-conversation: PASS - Creates or retrieves existing conversation, returns conversation_id, recipient info, is_new flag
Backend APIs - Messaging Flow.GET /api/messages/unread-counts/{user_id: PASS - Returns primary, requests, and total unread counts
Backend APIs - Messaging Flow.POST /api/messages/decline/{conversation: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid conversations (proper error handling)

Frontend - MapPage Featured Photographer.Panel display: PASS - Shows photographer list with name, location, session price
Frontend - MapPage Featured Photographer.Live status indicators: PASS - Shows LIVE badge and green dot for live photographers
Frontend - MapPage Featured Photographer.Session/photo counts: PASS - Shows 'X sessions • Y photos' for each photographer
Frontend - MapPage Featured Photographer.Map controls: PASS - GPS button and Featured button positioned correctly

Frontend - MessagesPage URL Parameter Ha.Conversation auto-select: PASS - Conversation is selected and displayed automatically
Frontend - MessagesPage URL Parameter Ha.Primary/Requests tabs: PASS - Both inbox tabs visible and functional
Frontend - MessagesPage URL Parameter Ha.Message Request banner: PASS - Shows 'This person isn't in your contacts' with Accept/Delete buttons

Frontend - Profile Message Button.Message button visibility: PASS - data-testid='message-button' visible on other user's profile
Frontend - Profile Message Button.Follow button: PASS - Follow button visible alongside Message button

Frontend - Message Request Flow.Accept request: PASS - Clicking Accept moves conversation to Primary inbox
Frontend - Message Request Flow.Message input: PASS - Message input appears after accepting request
Frontend - Message Request Flow.Conversation list update: PASS - Conversation appears in left sidebar after accept

AI Photo Analysis Example.Image analyzed: Surf photo with surfer in barrel
AI Photo Analysis Example.Conditions analyzed: large waves, clear weather, turquoise water

test_steps_executed: 3. Frontend: Tested MapPage Featured Photographers panel - button click, panel display, live indicators
4. Frontend: Tested MessagesPage with ?user= parameter - auto-conversation start
5. Frontend: Tested Profile page Message button - navigation to messages
6. Frontend: Tested Accept message request flow - toast, input visibility, conversation list
7. Verified AI Photo Analysis with curl - GPT-4o Vision working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Featured Photographers API uses scoring: earnings*2 + sessions*10 + gallery*5 + 100 if currently live. AI Photo Tagging uses GPT-4o Vision via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - successfully detects surfers, their actions, distinctive features, and surf conditions. Message request logic: new conversations start as 'request' for recipient unless they follow the sender. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_featured_ai_messaging.py covers all new APIs. Sarah Waters and Test Hobbyist now have an active conversation in Primary inbox (after accepting request).
